Madison / Dane County · Private workshop by appointment

Precision bicycle service for Madison riders.

For riders who care about how it feels — not just that it works.

Method Cycle Workshop is a service atelier for thoughtful riders, refined commuters, and bikes that deserve careful hands. The work is measured, human, and built around the outcome.

The approach

A bike should leave feeling quieter, smoother, more composed — like the work disappeared.

Method is built around the details that experienced riders notice immediately: bearing feel, drivetrain silence, brake confidence, clean routing, proper torque, fit-sensitive setup, and the small choices that make a bike feel intentional.

That judgment comes from 15 years in the bike industry, race mechanic experience, manufacturer-trained background, and more than six years consulting in the bicycle space.

Service board

Care in progressive tiers.

Simple enough to understand. Refined enough to match the bike. Each service starts with a proper request and an intake conversation before work begins.

01

Diagnostics

Inspection, symptom tracing, safety check, and a clear repair path before money is wasted.

02

Refined Tune

The core service for riders who want the bike crisp, quiet, and properly adjusted.

03

Concierge Tune

Priority handling, pickup/drop-off options, deeper cleaning, and more complete setup attention.

04

Custom / Build / Deep Work

Frame-up builds, recommissions, upgrades, and projects that deserve slow, careful execution.

05

Consultation

Buying advice, setup strategy, component direction, and high-level bike planning.

Booking flow

Handled properly.

Private workshop drop-off by appointment. Pickup and drop-off available within the local service radius, with free pickup/drop-off tied to qualifying service minimums.

Book a time.

Start a service request so the bike, symptoms, and outcome are known before the appointment.

We confirm details.

You get the right scope, expected timing, and any limits before the wrenching starts.

The bike gets handled.

Measured work, clean communication, and a return focused on feel — not just completion.

Start here

Bring the bike in with intention. Leave with it feeling right.

Send the bike, the issue, and what you want the ride to feel like. Method will confirm the appointment, scope, and next step.
